summary: Open draft PR re-splits the `ty` region, adjusts GALE01 split and symbol metadata, and makes broad source/header updates centered on `src/melee/ty` plus adjacent `if/text*`, fighter, game-mode, stage, and runtime files. Evidence is mostly file metadata and a truncated diff; there are no human review comments and the PR body is empty.

key_files.role: Updated split ownership and section ranges around `if/textdraw.c`, `if/textlib.c`, `ty/toy.c`, `ty/tylist.c`, `ty/tyfigupon.c`, `ty/tydisplay.c`, and nearby vi/sbss/bss ownership.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:splits.txt hunk around melee/if/textdraw.c through melee/vi/vi0501.c

key_files.role: Large symbol rename/scope update for toy/ty functions, replacing many `un_`/`fn_` names with `Toy_` or `_Toy_` names and changing some symbols to local scope.
Largest source change in PR; central toy/ty code reshaped to match new split/symbol/data ownership.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:splits.txt shows toy.c text range changed from 0x80305058-0x803124BC to 0x80304870-0x80312834 and adds bss/sbss ranges

key_files.role: Large type/header expansion for ty code.
New static header introduced for toy-local declarations or data split support.
Public toy header substantially reduced/reworked alongside new static header.
Major tydisplay source update and split range adjustment.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:splits.txt shows tydisplay.c text start moved from 0x803182D4 to 0x80318B1C and adds bss range

key_files.role: Major tyfigupon source update and text/sbss range adjustment.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:splits.txt shows tyfigupon.c text end moved from 0x803182D4 to 0x80318B1C and adds sbss range

key_files.role: Major tylist source update and added bss/sbss split ownership.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:splits.txt shows tylist.c text start moved to 0x80312834 and adds bss/sbss ranges

key_files.role: Text library code shrank and split ownership changed, likely due boundary movement between if/text and ty.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:splits.txt shows textlib.c text range changed from 0x80302834-0x80305058 to 0x803029B4-0x80304870 and adds rodata

key_files.role: Fighter data source reduced as part of cross-file data/prototype cleanup.
Build/config logic touched in support of the split/data changes.

what_changed: PR metadata reports 205 changed files, 4841 added lines, and 4415 deleted lines.

`config/GALE01/splits.txt` reassigns section ownership around the `if/text*` and `ty` region, including new bss/sbss/sdata2 ranges for `textdraw.c`, `toy.c`, `tylist.c`, `tyfigupon.c`, and `tydisplay.c`.

`config/GALE01/symbols.txt` performs a large rename/scope pass in the 0x80304870+ area, replacing many `un_803...`/`fn_803...` names with `Toy_803...` or `_Toy_803...` names and preserving some semantic names such as `Toy_GetTrophyTotal`, `Toy_SetUnlockState`, `Toy_RemoveUserData`, and `Toy_LoadLObjList`.

Core `src/melee/ty` sources and headers were heavily edited: `toy.c`, `tydisplay.c`, `tyfigupon.c`, `tylist.c`, `types.h`, `toy.h`, `toy.static.h`, `forward.h`, `tydisplay.h`, `tylist.h`, and `tyfigupon.h`.
The PR touches many one-line or small hunks across fighter, game-mode, stage, item, menu, vi, lb, and if code, consistent with propagated declarations/includes/symbol name updates from the re-split.
A new `src/melee/ft/chara/ft_459A.h` header appears in the changed-file metadata, and splits add a `melee/ft/ft_459A.c` bss range.

smart_moves.text: The split metadata and symbol metadata were updated together for the same address neighborhood, which is useful for data-matching work where section boundaries and symbol names must stay coordinated.
The symbol rename pattern keeps unknown functions address-bearing while adding a subsystem prefix (`Toy_803...`) rather than inventing full semantics for every function.

The introduction of `toy.static.h` alongside a reduced `toy.h` suggests separation between internal/static declarations and public toy interfaces, but the loaded slice does not show the header contents.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Large data re-splits can require synchronized edits to splits, symbols, source files, and headers; reviewers should inspect section ownership and symbol scope/name changes as one unit rather than as isolated source churn.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:splits.txt reassigns text/rodata/data/bss/sbss/sdata2 around if/text and ty
diff_excerpt:symbols.txt mass renames and local/global scope changes

decomp_lessons.lesson: When semantics are only partially known, a subsystem-prefixed address-style name such as `Toy_803048C0` can improve locality without claiming unsupported behavior; semantic names should be reserved for functions with supporting evidence.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:symbols.txt uses both semantic `Toy_GetTrophyTotal`/`Toy_SetUnlockState` and address-style `Toy_803...` names

naming_conventions.convention: Toy subsystem globals use `Toy_` prefix plus either a semantic suffix or address suffix.
Toy subsystem local/static symbols in symbols.txt may use `_Toy_` prefix plus address suffix when scope is marked local.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust split section boundaries before or alongside source matching so text/data/bss/sbss ownership reflects the intended translation-unit layout.
Use symbol-file scope changes (`scope:local`) to represent functions that remain address-named but are no longer exported/global in the recovered split.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt:symbols.txt changes `un_80304D30` global to `_Toy_80304D30` local and similar entries

accepted_candidate_records.title: Coordinate split metadata, symbol metadata, and headers during data re-splits
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR evidence shows a large ty-region re-split edited `config/GALE01/splits.txt`, `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`, central `src/melee/ty` sources, and many dependent headers/source callsites. This supports a reusable lesson that data split work should be reviewed across section boundaries, symbol names/scopes, and declaration surfaces together.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Toy subsystem address-style names
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR changes many toy-region symbols from generic `un_`/`fn_` names to `Toy_803...` for globals and `_Toy_803...` for local-scope symbols, while preserving semantic names only where present. Curator should consider whether this is a path-scoped naming convention for `src/melee/ty` and corresponding symbols.

source_update_candidates.title: ty split ownership around if/text and toy
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2752 evidence indicates the ty/text split boundary moved: `textdraw.c` text ends at 0x803029B4, `textlib.c` covers 0x803029B4-0x80304870, and `toy.c` begins at 0x80304870, with added bss/sbss/sdata2 ownership in several ty/text files. Curator should verify against current splits before adding path facts.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped split context, but current source verification is needed because the PR is open/draft and the diff slice is truncated.

source_update_candidates.title: toy.static.h introduced for toy internals
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2752 adds `src/melee/ty/toy.static.h` and substantially rewrites `toy.h`, suggesting internal/static declarations were separated from public toy declarations. Curator should inspect the full file contents before recording a header-organization fact.
source_update_candidates.reason: The changed-file metadata supports the structural change, but the loaded slice does not include full header contents.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider documenting subsystem-prefixed address names for partially understood symbols
source_update_candidates.text: This PR uses `Toy_803...` and `_Toy_803...` rather than inventing semantic names for many still-address-style functions. This aligns with conservative naming, but curator could decide whether a short example belongs in naming guidance.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential example for existing conservative-naming standard; do not promote as a new global rule without broader evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that the PR matched all data or passed validation; the only loaded bot comment says `No changes` without context.
Do not infer reviewer approval or requested changes; no human reviews or review comments are present.
Do not promote every `Toy_` rename as semantically proven; many names remain address-style and only indicate subsystem association in the shown diff.
Do not claim final split boundaries as accepted current facts without verifying current source because the PR is open/draft and the loaded diff is truncated.
